sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93361" key="sarkopoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρκο-ποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n93361.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making of flesh</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg004:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Antr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
